title: Workshop: Build a Volunteer Certification Results Table
summary: Workshop: Build a Volunteer Certification Results Table retrieves prior skills in an original heat-response volunteer certification results release scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply table structure, table header associations in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real heat-response volunteer certification results release artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
